name: qhs
description: Share AI-generated HTML instantly via quick-html-sharing. Paste HTML, get an unguessable shareable URL plus a private edit URL. Bundles a Claude Code skill (triggers on 'share this HTML' / 'give me a link' / 'publish this page') and the quick-html-share-mcp MCP server, so editing, deletion, and view stats all work from inside your agent.
